warning_thresholds.week_2_below_20_pct: WARNING: Indexing stalled. Check: sitemap submitted in GSC, internal linking present, no noindex tags, crawl budget not exhausted.
warning_thresholds.week_4_below_40_pct: CRITICAL: Likely crawl or quality issue. Check: manual actions in GSC, thin content flags, duplicate content, canonical conflicts.

what_to_watch_in_gsc: Coverage report: check 'Discovered - currently not indexed' count
Coverage report: check 'Crawled - currently not indexed' (quality signal)
Sitemaps report: submitted vs indexed count per sitemap
Page indexing: check individual lane page index status
Core Web Vitals: ensure pages pass CWV thresholds
Mobile usability: ensure all pages pass mobile checks

failure_modes.likely_cause: Thin content or low perceived value
failure_modes.action: Increase body content depth, add unique FAQs, improve internal linking

failure_modes.likely_cause: Sitemap not submitted or not crawled
failure_modes.action: Submit sitemaps in GSC, add sitemap reference to robots.txt

failure_modes.likely_cause: Crawl budget exhaustion or quality penalty
failure_modes.action: Check crawl stats in GSC, reduce low-value pages, improve page uniqueness
Improve content depth, add structured data, increase internal link equity

recommended_actions: Submit all sitemaps via Google Search Console immediately after publish
Request indexing for Week 1 pages manually in GSC URL inspection
Monitor Coverage report daily for first 2 weeks
Set up GSC email alerts for coverage drops
